message: Node started: Perform an intensive search in academic databases (arXiv, INSPIRE-HEP, etc.) for the specific theoretical parameters that define the 'classicality' of single-photon Hawking radiation. Look for dimensionless constants related to the photon statistics, the Wigner function negativity, or the squeezing parameters in the context of Hawking radiation. Identify exactly three universal dimensionless constants and provide their exact numerical values.
